top_signals.title: Lithium start-up EnergyX plans ‘Battery Mecca’ in Texas
top_signals.summary: Project aims to disrupt China’s dominance of the supply chain
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Jamie Dimon to Pitch SpaceX IPO to JPMorgan’s Ultra-Rich Clients
top_signals.summary: JPMorgan Chase CEO Jamie Dimon plans to discuss the upcoming SpaceX initial public offering with thousands of the bank’s high-net-worth clients in a “live interactive discussion” from JPMorgan’s headquarters. Benedikt Kammel reports on Bloomberg Television. (Source: Bloomberg)

top_signals.title: Broadcom headed for $300bn market value wipeout as revenue forecast disappoints
top_signals.summary: Shares in chip company fall 15 per cent in pre-market trading on Thursday

top_signals.title: Kongsberg Maritime, DNV Integrate Vessel Data Platforms
top_signals.summary: DNV and Kongsberg Maritime have entered into an agreement to enable the secure and standardized exchange of operational vessel data between Kongsberg Maritime’s digital fleet management solution and DNV’s Veracity platform.The agreement establishes…
